project_type: Monorepo with pnpm workspaces - multiple apps (Next.js frontends + Fastify backends) and shared packages
build_system: pnpm + turbo - monorepo with workspace:* dependencies, turbo handles task orchestration
test_framework: vitest - tests in src/__tests__/ directories, pattern: describe/it/expect, no global setup needed
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/ai-memory --filter=@quant/identity-permissions --filter=@quant/quantai 2. Run pnpm turbo test for those packages 3. Run pnpm turbo build for those packages 4. Run pnpm turbo lint for those packages
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node >= 22. pnpm 10.28.1. TypeScript ~5.5.0.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs (<=500 LOC per PR), all gates pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint. Privacy by default.
key_patterns: Packages export from src/index.ts. Types in src/types.ts. Tests in src/__tests__/. Backend routes use Fastify with zod validation. In-memory implementations with NOTE comments about future persistence. Context graph uses ResourceType from identity-permissions types. Memory uses categories enum. Export uses zod schemas for validation.
directory_structure: packages/ai-memory/ - AI memory store, export, explainer. packages/identity-permissions/ - RBAC, consent, context graph, memory manager. apps/quantai/ - Next.js frontend + Fastify backend. apps/quantai/backend/routes/ - API routes. apps/quantai/src/pages/ - UI pages.
